news.title: ME student Eva Stafne awarded prestigious 2026 Goldwater Scholarship
news.summary_en: Eva Stafne, a University of Wisconsin-Madison junior majoring in mechanical engineering and completing a certificate in international engineering, has received a 2026 Goldwater Scholarship, the premier undergraduate scholarship in mathematics, engineering and the natural sciences…

news.title: Leveling up: How a passion for engineering led Travis Frederick to the NFL and into the dragon’s lair
news.summary_en: Fans of Travis Frederick, the former Wisconsin Badgers and Dallas Cowboys center affectionately known as “Fredbeard,” know of his many accomplishments on the field: first team All-American; 2025 Badger Hall of Fame inductee; first-round draft…
